specs.title: Running query is shown if query is running
Query tab defaults to Top mode
Query Top tab shows expected column headers
Query tab first row has values for all columns in Top mode
Query tab can switch between Top and Running modes
Query tab allows changing between Per hour and Per minute views
Top Query rows components have consistent height across different query lengths
Scroll to row, get shareable link, navigate to URL and verify row is scrolled into view
No runnning queries in Queries if no queries are running

specs.title: Query execution status changes correctly
Running selected query via keyboard shortcut executes only selected part
Running selected query via context menu executes only selected part
Results controls collapse and expand functionality
Copy result button copies to clipboard
Run button executes YQL script
Run button executes Scan
Explain button executes YQL script explanation
Explain button executes Scan explanation
Error is displayed for invalid query for run
Error is displayed for invalid query for explain
Run and Explain buttons are disabled when query is empty
Stop button and elapsed time label appear when query is running
Query streaming finishes in reasonable time
Query execution is terminated when stop button is clicked
Streaming query shows some results and banner when stop button is clicked
Stop button is not visible for quick queries
Stop button works for Execute mode
Stop button works for Explain mode
Changing tab inside results pane doesnt change results view
Changing tab inside editor doesnt change results view
Changing tab to diagnostics doesnt change results view
Result head value is 1 for 1 row result
No result head value for no result
Truncated head value is 1 for 1 row truncated result
